03-8301.title: S1406 – WS Fiesta ECOnetic (Diesel) Glow Plug Control Module
03-8301.concern:
The Glow Plug Control Module (GPCM) can be affected by wet conditions due to its
location (front lower left hand side of the engine compartment). The GPCM is not water
proof and water ingress into the module may cause overheating.
Dealers are required to replace the Glow Plug Control Module with a new water proof Glow
Plug Control Module.

Parts required:
1x AV61-12A343-CA
1x SRCC 16D128 B

FAB2026033.title: FAB2026033 - Transit VO 25.5 MY Tow Pack Update (Long Wheel Base/LWB Wiring)
FAB2026033.concern: In the Transit Tow Pack, Existing wiring harness P/N RK3Z15A416F was too short in length for certain variants (LWB).
FAB2026033.symptom: In the Transit Tow Pack, Existing wiring harness P/N RK3Z15A416F was too short in length for certain variants (LWB).
FAB2026033.description: In the Transit Tow Pack, Existing wiring harness P/N RK3Z15A416F was too short in length for certain variants (LWB).

22S06.title: 22S06 – MUSTANG Luggage Compartment Lid Wiring and Rear View Camera Inspection
22S06.concern:
In all of the affected vehicles, damage to the luggage compartment lid wiring harness in the area of the
right side luggage compartment lid hinge may lead to intermittent rear view camera operation, loss of
satellite radio reception, inoperative luggage compartment lamp and/or inoperable luggage
compartment release.
In addition, in some of the affected 2015 model year vehicles, insufficient electrical conductivity within
the Printed Circuit Board (PCB) internal to the camera may also lead to intermittent rear view camera
operation
